acceptance_targets: [ch09-craft-01] Pass if the revised ending after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:509 shows Leela on page and includes at least one physical school-handoff interaction (badge scan, guardian receipt, door release, or staff check) that changes what Nita or Ben does next; fail if the chapter still ends before the pickup occurs.

[ch09-craft-02] Pass if, in the revised kitchen scene anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:221, at least one major conclusion about the badge, apartment, or child-handoff is reached by Nita or Ben without Pilar spelling it out first, and the scene introduces a new consequence beyond the rooftop explanation; fail if Pilar still delivers a third full statement of the corridor logic around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:313.

[ch09-prose-01] Pass if no more than one of the four highlighted beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:117, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:269, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:313, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:511 still uses consecutive negation fragments, and the rewritten beats derive emphasis from scene-specific physical detail rather than abstract correction alone.

[award_001] Pass if a reader can still explain the corridor after reading `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3937-3981` and `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4077-4183`, but the child-handoff mechanism is fully articulated only once and the kitchen scene advances through Nita and Ben making connections from the objects on the table. Fail if Pilar still restates the same mechanism in near-parallel language after the roof scene has already taught it.

[award_010] Pass if the revised beat at `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4233-4235` makes Pilar's anger sharper through a concrete, character-specific motion or speech change. Fail if the passage still uses facial flattening/stillness as the primary descriptor.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised ending after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:509 shows Leela on page and includes at least one physical school-handoff interaction (badge scan, guardian receipt, door release, or staff check) that changes what Nita or Ben does next; fail if the chapter still ends before the pickup occurs.
findings.problem: Timidity at the point of consequence: once the chapter identifies Leela's in-person handoff as the commodity, it leaves the apartment before the newly understood pickup is actually staged, so the ugliest consequence stays discussed rather than dramatized.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress some of the recap around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:381, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:487, and extend or replace the material after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:509 so the chapter reaches the school and renders the pickup corridor on page: Leela arriving, badge or guardian verification, adult bodies occupying the route, and Nita/Ben reacting in the moment rather than in abstract.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, in the revised kitchen scene anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:221, at least one major conclusion about the badge, apartment, or child-handoff is reached by Nita or Ben without Pilar spelling it out first, and the scene introduces a new consequence beyond the rooftop explanation; fail if Pilar still delivers a third full statement of the corridor logic around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:313.
findings.problem: The corridor mechanism gets explained three times in close succession, mostly through Pilar, so the chapter's middle movement turns schematic and stalls escalation just when Nita's independent recognition should take over.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten the kitchen explanation centered on snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:221, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:255, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:313 by letting Nita and Ben infer more from the badge, map, and benefits log at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:235, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:265, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:275, while Pilar supplies only the missing proof or correction. Make the kitchen scene add a new operational consequence or disagreement instead of restating the full corridor thesis.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if no more than one of the four highlighted beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:117, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:269, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:313, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:511 still uses consecutive negation fragments, and the rewritten beats derive emphasis from scene-specific physical detail rather than abstract correction alone.
findings.problem: A repeated negation-correction sentence shape becomes audible enough to flatten emphasis: the chapter keeps landing key beats with 'Not X. Not Y.' or equivalent corrective fragments, so revelations start sounding pre-shaped instead of freshly perceived.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast at least two of the emphasis beats around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:117, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:269, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:313, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:511 so the force comes from image, action, or sensory consequence specific to the current object or body rather than another negation stack. Keep one if you want the rhythm; vary the others.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a reader can still explain the corridor after reading `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3937-3981` and `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4077-4183`, but the child-handoff mechanism is fully articulated only once and the kitchen scene advances through Nita and Ben making connections from the objects on the table. Fail if Pilar still restates the same mechanism in near-parallel language after the roof scene has already taught it.
findings.problem: The novel's central reveal turns explanatory twice over. Pilar gives the corridor mechanism in a long roof briefing at `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3937-3981`, then the kitchen scene re-briefs the same child-handoff logic at `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4077-4183`. The chapter still lands, but a core book-engine moment starts reading like tutorial repetition instead of discovery, which softens the shock and undercuts reader inference.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress the first explanation at `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3937-3981` to the minimum Ben cannot infer alone, then rebuild the second pass at `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4077-4183` around the badge, ride-denial screenshot, map, and benefits log. Keep one blunt naming of `live interoperability corridor`, but cut the repeated body-to-body-handoff explanation and let Nita's deductions at `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4129-4193` do the heavier work.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised beat at `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4233-4235` makes Pilar's anger sharper through a concrete, character-specific motion or speech change. Fail if the passage still uses facial flattening/stillness as the primary descriptor.
findings.problem: Full-book recurring pattern: default facial/body arrest appears in 4 chapters (`went still` / `went flat`). At `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4233`, Pilar's anger resolves into `her face went flat again`, which is functional but generic and contributes to a repeated full-book reaction cue.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace `snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4233-4235` with a Pilar-specific anger tell: how she handles her knee, scarf, shoulders, or voice when patience is over. Keep the beat hard and unsentimental, but do not rely on `went flat` or equivalent facial flattening shorthand.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the ugly overlap between office systems and intimate life: sweat under formalwear, sponsored groceries in the middle of a fight, sex that clarifies nothing, a child noticing coercion through object logic. When choosing between elegant abstraction and embarrassing specificity, choose specificity unless the character is actively lying to themselves. If a scene risks becoming pure farce, restore weight through money, care work, or the body's limits; if it risks becoming solemn prestige fiction, let the absurd machinery stay absurd.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a draft replaces bodily fact, financial shame, sexual consequence, or emotional cruelty with tasteful summary, rewrite until the cost is present in scene rather than merely reported.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, ritual formality, or character-specific self-control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: No two consecutive chapters should move the same way. Follow spectacle with aftermath, ritual with drift, humiliation with quiet, revelation with preparation. Vary scene count, dialogue density, location spread, and whether the chapter advances by confrontation, seduction, dread, comic escalation, or changed understanding.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary English with room for corporate and systems language when characters would actually think or speak that way; every abstract term should be contaminated by bodily or household reality nearby.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third that stays inside the current focalizer's sensory field and only shifts focalization at scene breaks.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate dry compression for comic pressure with longer, accrual-based sentences when shame, fatigue, or desire flood the body. Let jokes land through timing and juxtaposition rather than narrator commentary.
